name: Tidehold Development Co., Ltd.
summary: Tidehold Development Co., Ltd. engages in the international trade business in Taiwan. It sells oil, gas, garbage, and resource recycling trucks; rents small passenger cars; and develops and sells residential and other buildings. The company was formerly known as Tidehold Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Tidehold Development Co., Ltd. in 1998. Tidehold Development Co., Ltd. was founded in 1949 and is based in Taipei, Taiwan.
